title: lithocarpus kingianus
intro: Lithocarpus kingianus, also known as King's nut or Taiwan king nut, is a species of evergreen tree native to Taiwan and parts of China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lithocarpus kingianus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Lithocarpus kingianus is often prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also used in traditional cooking and as a food ingredient.
